t_ch: 啊呀，是的。我那俩女儿又在学校闯了什么祸——
t_en: Ah, yes. Did my daughters cause trouble at school again...?

t_ch: 哎哟，你瞧我，都老糊涂了。我那俩争气的女儿，早就毕业啦，现在在树庭做学者呢。你说我，年纪大了，总是一个晃神，就看到好多年前的事情。
t_en: Alas, forgive this old brain of mine. Both of my daughters graduated long ago, and they are now scholars at the Grove. As I get older, memories from years past tend to blend together.

t_ch: 怎么啦，年轻人，怎么不说话？总不能是我的女儿们，真闯祸了吧？
t_en: What's the matter, young one? Why so quiet? Did my daughters really get into some trouble?

t_ch: 她们要不肯道歉，尽管和我说，我这个老父亲在她们那儿，还是有些脸面的……
t_en: If they refuse to apologize, just let me know. Their old dad can still talk some sense into them...

t_ch: …怎么办，阁下，我开不了口……
t_en: ...What should we do? I really can't tell him...

t_ch: 别问我，看不出我眼圈也红了么？
t_en: Don't ask me. I'm getting all teary-eyed as well...

t_ch: …费贝尔先生，库娜涅和阿塔卡玛她们…被黑潮杀死了。
t_en: ...Mr. Fabio, the black tide... took Cynane and Artakama.
...What?

t_ch: …她们为了保护树庭、抗争黑潮，战至最后一刻了。
t_en: ...They fought until their last breath against the black tide to defend the Grove.

t_ch: 我是驻留树庭的黄金裔，没能保护好她们，费贝尔先生，如果您有怒火……
t_en: As the Chrysos Heir stationed at the Grove, I failed to protect them. Mr. Fabio, if you're upset...

t_ch: …瞧你说的。我家的阿塔卡玛，即便并非预言中的黄金裔，但不也是英雄么？
t_en: ...Don't put it that way. Even if my Artakama wasn't one of the Chrysos Heirs mentioned in the prophecy, she was still a heroine, wasn't she?

t_ch: 什么事？我正忙着，最近城里可不太平，大小事务弄得我头昏眼花……
t_en: What's wrong? I'm busy. There's a lot going on in the city, and I've got my hands full...

t_ch: 先生，还请你拨冗……
t_en: Mister, we're sorry to bother you, but...

t_ch: …啊，是遐蝶女士？莫非是我工作上出了什么差错，阿格莱雅大人派你来敲打我？
t_en: ...Wait, Lady Castorice? Did Lady Aglaea send you because of some mistake I made at work?

t_ch: 冷静，提图斯。我是神悟树庭的阿那克萨戈拉斯，与你的父亲老提图斯是同道。
t_en: Keep your cool, Titus. I'm Anaxagoras from the Grove of Epiphany and a colleague of your father, Old Titus.

t_ch: 不久前…你的父亲，去世了。
t_en: A few days ago... your father passed away.

t_ch: 什…什么？老爷子他？
t_en: Wait, what? My old man died?

t_ch: 哈…倒也正常。老爷子一把年纪，什么时候掉进冥河里都不稀奇……
t_en: Heh... That's no shocker. At his age, he was due for the River of Souls any time.

t_ch: 你别太过分！他可是……
t_en: How can you say that!? He's your...

t_ch: 哈…混账老爷子，走得倒是轻巧……
t_en: Heh... Just up and left me behind, that old man...

t_ch: 我早和他说过，一把年纪了，老老实实回圣城养老不好么？非要去什么树庭，和一群神神叨叨的学者瞎折腾。
t_en: I've been telling him for ages to stay in the holy city and enjoy his retirement. But no, he just had to go off to that Grove and mess around with those scholars.

t_ch: 吵了那么多回，愣是不肯听话…老犟种！
t_en: Still wouldn't budge after all those arguments... That stubborn old thing!

t_ch: 他回心转意后住的房子我都物色好了…现在，别说养老，连最后一面都没见上……
t_en: I already got him a retirement home and was waiting for him to come around... All my effort is wasted now, and he didn't even give me a chance to say goodbye...

t_ch: …老犟种！老倔牛！
t_en: ...That bullheaded old man! Stubborn as a mule!

t_ch: …就这样吧。我记得的同僚家属，就这些了。
t_en: That is it. That's all the colleagues' families that I remember.

t_ch: 牺牲者和家属们都令人敬佩。
t_en: Those who sacrificed their lives and their families are truly admirable.

t_ch: …辛苦了，{NICKNAME}阁下…那刻夏老师。
t_en: Good work, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME} and... Professor Anaxa.

t_ch: 走吧，带我去见阿格莱雅。
t_en: Let's go. Take me to see Aglaea.

t_ch: 好…我来带路。
t_en: Alright... I'll lead the way.

t_ch: 遐蝶小姐，{NICKNAME}阁下，你们回来了。
t_en: Miss Castorice, {M#Lord}{F#Lady} {NICKNAME}, you're back.

t_ch: 你好，我们有要事求见阿格莱雅大人，麻烦通报一下。
t_en: Hello. We have an important matter to discuss with Lady Aglaea. May we trouble you to inform her of our presence?

t_ch: 抱歉，遐蝶小姐…阿格莱雅女士此前已吩咐过我，她现在无暇接待任何人。
t_en: My apologies, Miss Castorice... Lady Aglaea has just informed me that she has no time to receive anyone at the moment.

t_ch: 呵，这下倒好——她甚至不愿意见我一面。
t_en: Hmph, that's just great. She refuses to even see me.

t_ch: 这位朋友，换我来问问，阿格莱雅有没有命令你，直接将我扭送至监狱？
t_en: Answer me this, friend. Did Aglaea order you to take me directly to prison?

t_ch: 你…又是谁？
t_en: Who... are you?

t_ch: 请别开玩笑了…她大概确实在忙。我们稍等片刻，我尝试用石版联络一下。
t_en: Please don't jest... It's possible that she really is busy. Let's wait here a moment, and I'll try to contact her using the slate.

t_ch: 不用拖着病躯与那女人对峙，真是一桩幸事。遐蝶，还有这位来不及认识的朋友，我今日就先行告退了。
t_en: It's fortunate we don't have to confront that woman while I'm hauling around this sick body. Castorice, and this friend I haven't gotten the chance to know — I'll take my leave for today.

t_ch: 那泰坦自顾自对我做了一番手脚…到现在脑袋还是隐隐作痛。如果可能，我不想在这聒噪的城里再多晃悠一秒。
t_en: That Titan made a myriad of adjustments on their own... My head still aches from that. I don't want to stay a second longer in this noisy city if I can.

t_ch: 还请小心。奥赫玛不是树庭，这里……
t_en: Please be careful. Okhema isn't the Grove. This place...

t_ch: ——遍地都是她的金丝，我知道。那女人相当自信，笃定我逃不出她的掌心。
t_en: ...Is covered by her golden threads, I know. That woman is extremely confident I won't escape her grasp.

t_ch: 放心吧，就如我之前所说，我会保持分寸。
t_en: Don't worry. As I said before, I'll mind my behavior.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，这趟树庭之行…实在发生了太多意料外的事情，我们本无意将你卷入危险，遑论直面黑潮……
t_en: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, so many unexpected things happened on our journey to the Grove... We truly had no intention of putting you in danger, let alone face the black tide head on...

t_ch: 麻烦是老朋友了。
t_en: Trouble is my old friend by now.

t_ch: 活着回来了，黑潮也不过如此。
t_en: We made it back alive. So much for the black tide.

t_ch: 阁下，万不可小觑黑潮这等威胁。
t_en: Please do not underestimate the threat the black tide poses.

t_ch: 黑潮是奥赫玛，乃至整个翁法罗斯的大敌。曾经，纷争的势力对圣城虎视眈眈，但不可否认的是，那群战争眷属也将黑潮阻拦在悬锋城外。
t_en: The black tide is not just an enemy of Okhema, but all of Amphoreus. Even back when the forces of Strife coveted the holy city, their warriors still undeniably halted the black tide outside Castrum Kremnos.

t_ch: 如今{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}火种缺位，黑潮卷土重来…作为对黑潮研究最深的学院城邦，树庭绝非不堪一击之辈，却在朝夕之间倾覆，徒留一城英灵血泪……
t_en: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} Coreflame now sits vacant and the black tide has returned... The Grove is an academic city with the best understanding of the black tide. It shouldn't have fallen so easily, and yet it was taken overnight, leaving the city in blood and tears, haunted by the spirits of departed heroes...

t_ch: 「纷争」的试炼已是迫在眉睫，希望万敌…能尽早下定决心吧。
t_en: The trial of Strife is imminent. I pray Mydei will be able to steel his resolve soon...

t_ch: 还有那黑袍的剑士…
t_en: And that black-robed swordmaster...

t_ch: 树庭的可怕敌人，也是黑潮造物？
t_en: The dreadful enemies of the Grove are also creations of the black tide?

t_ch: 缇宝老师曾走遍翁法罗斯万千城邦，可就连她们都对这个黑袍剑士毫无印象…此人绝不可小觑，一人一剑便将我们逼得喘不过气，对黄金裔来说，无疑是新的威胁。
t_en: Lady Tribbie once traveled across thousands of cities in Amphoreus to repel the black tide, but even they have no recollection of this powerful enemy in all their journeys. Perhaps the fall of Strife has triggered even more terrifying events in unseen places...

t_ch: 缇宝大人为了抗击黑潮踏上旅途，然而自旅途伊始，到走过万千城邦，她们都未曾在黑潮中遭遇如此强敌。说不定是「纷争」陨落，暗中激起了更为骇人的影响……
t_en: Lady Tribbie once traveled across thousands of cities in Amphoreus to repel the black tide, but even they have no recollection of this powerful enemy in all their journeys. Perhaps the fall of Strife has triggered even more terrifying events in unseen places...

t_ch: 至于我…我在它身上探到了浓厚的死亡气息——并非是它与{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}有什么关联，恐怕…单单只因它无数次手握他人的死亡吧。
t_en: As for me... I detected a strong stench of death from that entity, but it wasn't because he had a connection with {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}... I'm afraid it's purely because he has sent countless others to their deaths.

t_ch: 说到{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}…{NICKNAME}阁下，还有一事，希望与你确认。
t_en: Speaking of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}... {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, there is something else I wish to verify with you.

t_ch: 阁下对我背负的…诅咒，应该已经有所了解。我生来便是死亡的影子，是其它有生之物避之不及的剧毒……
t_en: You must have an idea of the... curse I bear by now. I was born as the Shadow of Death, a poison shunned by all living beings...

t_ch: 但当时，在树庭，你接下我的时候……
t_en: Yet when you caught me in the Grove...

t_ch: …我只是好奇，为何{NICKNAME}阁下能不被我的力量影响？
t_en: ...I'm curious why you weren't affected by my power, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 你不说我都想不起来这事。
t_en: I had totally forgotten about this until you brought it up.

t_ch: 时间太短，还没奏效？
t_en: Maybe it just hasn't taken effect yet?

t_ch: 如果只是以指尖轻触，或许还能解释。但当时的情况……
t_en: That might be the case if we only brushed the very tips of our fingers, but back then...

t_ch: 习惯了，我就是这么特别。
t_en: I'm used to it. I'm just special like that.

t_ch: 这么说来，在涡心时似乎也…
t_en: Now that you mention it, I think the same thing happened in the Vortex...

t_ch: 抱歉，是我的提问太唐突了。迄今为止的人生，我始终在思考：死亡一事，于我而言究竟为何，我又为何与{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}有着千丝万缕的联系……
t_en: My apologies for the abrupt question. For all my life, I've always wondered: What is my connection to death? And why am I inextricably linked to {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}?

t_ch: 奔波数日，想必{NICKNAME}阁下也很疲惫了吧？请暂时将树庭的惨剧抛在脑后，好好休息一日吧。
t_en: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, you must be tired after being on the move these past few days. Please set aside the tragedy at the Grove for now and rest for the day.

t_ch: 好久不见。你的遭遇，我听白厄说了…真是辛苦了。
t_en: Long time no see. I've heard about what happened from Phainon... You've been through a lot.

t_ch: 不辛苦，为「开拓」服务。
t_en: Not at all. It's all in service to Trailblaze.

t_ch: 呵…没想到翁法罗斯还能锤炼无名客的意志。
t_en: Heh... I wasn't expecting Amphoreus to temper the will of the Nameless.

t_ch: 生命是种挣扎。
t_en: Life is a struggle.

t_ch: …但愿你不会堕入「开拓」的黑暗面。
t_en: ...May you never succumb to the dark side of Trailblaze.

t_ch: 亲爱的朋友，我想死你啦！
t_en: I missed you so much, my dearest friend!

t_ch: …看来你受的打击不小。
t_en: ...It seems you took things pretty hard.

t_ch: 我不在的时候，你在做什么？
t_en: What were you doing while I was gone?

t_ch: 整理日志，顺便从风堇那里要了些树庭的研究资料。
t_en: I was organizing logs. I also asked Hyacine for some research material from the Grove.

t_ch: 发现一件很有趣的事。还记得么？翁法罗斯的天空被一位泰坦封锁了，{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}…它的存在让这个世界与天外隔绝。
t_en: I discovered something interesting. Do you remember that Amphoreus's sky was sealed away by a Titan? {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila's{RUBY_E#} presence keeps this world isolated from the rest of the world beyond the sky.

t_ch: 而风堇的先祖…似乎就是信仰{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的天空祭司。要找到返回星穹列车的办法，也许她能提供更多线索。
t_en: It seems Hyacine's ancestors were the Sky Priests who worshipped {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}. Perhaps she can give us more clues to find a way back to the Astral Express.

t_ch: 这几日，圣城没什么突发状况，也不用和人打交道。独处的感觉还不坏。
t_en: Nothing out of the ordinary happened in the holy city in the past few days. I didn't have to talk to anyone either. It was kind of nice spending time alone.

t_ch: 别急，你的好日子要到头咯！
t_en: Just you wait. Your good times are coming to an end!

t_ch: 树庭事发，接下来肯定又会有几番动荡。事已至此，先休息吧。
t_en: After what happened at the Grove, there's sure to be unrest in the coming days. We should rest for now.

t_ch: 苦啊！还不如陪你整理文件呢。
t_en: Awful! I should have stayed and organized documents with you.

t_ch: …恐怕你整理到一半一样会叫苦罢工吧。
t_en: ...I'm afraid you'd probably find the task of organizing just as awful.

t_ch: 看你满脸疲惫，明日出发前还是多睡会儿为好……
t_en: You look tired. You should get some sleep before we set off tomorrow...

t_ch: …对了。我听到一些风声…如果你要出去闲逛，建议先避开高温浴池。
t_en: Oh, by the way, I heard some rumors... If you're going to wander around, I suggest avoiding the hot bath.

t_ch: 不久后……
t_en: Moments later...

t_ch: …克拉特鲁斯！这是怎么回事？
t_en: ...Krateros! What's going on?

t_ch: 啊，迈德漠斯……
t_en: Ah, Mydeimos...

t_ch: 没想到，是我先暴露了软肋…呵。
t_en: It seems I was the one who exposed my vulnerabilities first... Heh.

t_ch: 阿格莱雅！给我一个解释。
t_en: Aglaea! I demand an explanation.

t_ch: 这个男人以武力挟持了缇宁，强迫她带自己来到创世涡心。
t_en: This man abducted Trinnon by force and forced her to bring him to the Vortex of Genesis.

t_ch: 然后，他竟然还大胆踏入了{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}的试炼…当然，以失败告终。
t_en: He then brazenly stepped into the trial of the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#}... And naturally, failed.

t_ch: 她说的是真的吗？你为何要这么做？
t_en: Is she telling the truth? Why did you do that?

t_ch: 因为我不想再等待了，你的犹疑令人绝望。
t_en: Because I don't want to wait anymore. Your hesitation made me desperate.

t_ch: 你若想逃避成王的宿命，那便逃吧。总有人会站出来，填补「纷争」的空缺…引领我族还乡。
t_en: If you want to run away from your destiny to become king, then keep running. Someone will eventually stand up and fill in the gap left by Strife... Then they will lead our people home.

t_ch: 吾师，岁月怎会让你变得如此蒙昧！
t_en: Age has blinded you, teacher!

t_ch: 你还没看清吗？令我彷徨的理由，正是你这溶入骨血的鲁莽和冲动。
t_en: Can't you see that I'm hesitating because of this very recklessness seared into your blood?

t_ch: 克拉特鲁斯，你当真觉得自己有资格染指试炼，亵渎神谕？
t_en: Krateros, do you truly believe you're worthy of entering the trial? To blaspheme against the prophecy?

t_ch: 我等黄金裔的使命，在你眼中就是这般儿戏？
t_en: Does the mission we Chrysos Heirs bear seem like child's play to you?

t_ch: 想知道你在悬锋人眼里是什么模样吗，阿格莱雅？
t_en: Do you know how the Kremnoans see you, Aglaea?

t_ch: 伪善者…野心家！创世的神谕，逐火之旅，不过是你用来攫取权力的说辞罢了。
t_en: You're a hypocrite... and a megalomaniac! The prophecy of genesis and the Flame-Chase Journey are just excuses for you to seize power.

t_ch: 住口，克拉特鲁斯！你知道自己在说什么吗？
t_en: Silence, Krateros! Do you even know what you're saying?

t_ch: 你要维护这女人吗，迈德漠斯？过去的千年里，围绕她——还有她们宣扬的神谕，多少战火燃起，多少城邦自相残杀？
t_en: Are you defending this woman, Mydeimos? How many wars did people start because of her and her so-called prophecy? How many cities fell in the past millennium, their people massacring each other?

t_ch: 就算所谓的「创世」真的存在，那新世界里会有悬锋族人的一席之地吗？
t_en: Even if this so-called "genesis" really exists, will there be a place for the Kremnoans in that new world?

t_ch: 你的发言结束了吗？
t_en: Are you done talking?

t_ch: 依照黄金裔与元老院达成的协定，私闯创世涡心之人无需经过议会审判，可由我自行发落。
t_en: By agreement between the Chrysos Heirs and the Council of Elders, those who trespass upon the Vortex of Genesis need not be tried by the Council. I am allowed to pass judgment alone.

t_ch: 克拉特鲁斯，你的行为无可宽恕。我在此宣判……
t_en: Krateros, your actions are unforgivable. I hereby sentence you...

t_ch: 阿雅！等一下！
t_en: Agy, wait!

t_ch: *我们*…有一个提议。这场城邦之间的矛盾，总得有人站出来解决。
t_en: ...We have a proposal. Someone has to resolve this conflict between the cities.

t_ch: 克拉特鲁斯阁下并未用暴力伤害*我们*。*我们*能感受到，他的焦虑源于对族人前途的担忧。
t_en: Lord Krateros did not use violence to harm us. We can sense that his anxiety stems from his concern for his people's future.

t_ch: 拜托了，阿格莱雅，请先听听*我们*的想法。
t_en: Please, Aglaea. Hear us out first.

t_ch: 我在听。
t_en: I'm listening.

t_ch: 抱歉，克拉特鲁斯阁下。我们终日只顾着解读预言的碎片，却忽视了那些未被神谕青睐的人们…你的指控尽管刺耳，但也合乎情理。
t_en: I'm sorry, Lord Krateros. We were so preoccupied with deciphering the fragments of prophecy that we neglected those of you not favored by its message... Your accusations were harsh but justified.

t_ch: 我们想得到你，还有悬锋族人的信任。我想，最好的办法…就是带你亲眼见证<color=#dbc291ff>预言的源头</color>。
t_en: We wish to earn your trust, and those of the Kremnoans. I think the best way to do that... is to take you to witness the <color=#dbc291ff>source of the prophecy</color> for yourself.

t_ch: …你要如何让我看见虚无缥缈之物？
t_en: ...How are you going to show me something that has no form?

t_ch: 你已听说了那位异乡人的事，对吗？出于某种原因，{M#他}{F#她}与{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}建立了联系，能完整地复现往日的风景。
t_en: You've heard about that outlander, right? {M#He}{F#She} has somehow made a connection with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} and can completely replicate scenes from the past.

t_ch: *我们*会请求{M#他}{F#她}的帮助。明日，在命运重渊，雅努萨波利斯的神殿…克拉特鲁斯，*我们*愿意为你展示那段久远的记忆，毫无保留。
t_en: We will ask for {M#his}{F#her} aid. Tomorrow, at the Abyss of Fate in the Temple of Janusopolis... we will show you everything from that distant memory, Krateros.

t_ch: …听上去很公平。我接受这个提议。
t_en: ...A fair proposal. I accept.

t_ch: 但在那之前，你将被剥夺行动的自由。这是我的底线，决无让步的可能。
t_en: Until then, you will be stripped of your freedom. That is my one condition and I will brook no argument.

t_ch: 呵，这不是我第一次做别人的阶下囚了。悉听尊便，「半神」。
t_en: Hmph, it is not the first time I've been made someone else's prisoner. Do as you please, "demigod."

t_ch: 吾师…为何要做到这个地步？
t_en: Teacher... why did you do this?

t_ch: 抱歉，少主…我不能再忍耐了。
t_en: Forgive me, young master, but I just cannot wait any longer.

t_ch: 自你的父亲死后，我和族人就一直在等待复兴悬锋的时机。我们将一切希望寄托于你，却迟迟没有得到回应。
t_en: Ever since your father died, our people and I have been waiting for a day to revive Kremnos. We placed all of our hopes in you but never received an answer.

t_ch: 还乡的执念已成了我族的病根！你如此睿智，我不相信你看不清简单的真相……
t_en: This obsession for returning home has become a sickness for our people! Wise as you are, I refuse to believe that you can't see the truth...

t_ch: 你很清醒，因此才无比孤独。聪明的人，只能选择与世俗沉沦。
t_en: You have a clear head, which is why you're also incomparably alone. A smart person can only choose to tangle himself with the mundane of this world.

t_ch: 你若真能带领族人打破这染血的命运，就再次证明给我看吧，迈德漠斯。
t_en: If you're truly capable of leading our people beyond this bloodstained fate, then prove it to me once more, Mydeimos.

t_ch: 就像你当时做到的那样……
t_en: Just as you did back then...

t_ch: 真是勇猛的斗士…软弱的奥赫玛人，竟也拥有如此豪杰。
t_en: A fierce fighter... I did not expect such heroism from a feeble Okheman.

t_ch: 履行胜者的义务，报上名来，战士！我向你索求荣耀的死亡！
t_en: Fulfill your duty as the victor, warrior, and tell me your name! I seek an honorable death from you!

t_ch: 「荣耀」…你与这二字何干？
t_en: As if you have any honor!

t_ch: 洗耳恭听吧！我是悬锋孤军之首，{RUBY_B#万敌}迈德漠斯{RUBY_E#}——
t_en: Listen closely! I am the leader of the Kremnoan Detachment — {RUBY_B#Mydei}Mydeimos{RUBY_E#}!

t_ch: ——我来贯穿你的胸膛了，父亲！
t_en: I'm here to finish you, father.

t_ch: 是你…遭人唾弃的野兽，你真的拒绝了死亡。预言不假…朕的悬锋王朝，终究要结束在你手里……
t_en: It is you... the beast spurned by all. So, you did defy death. The prophecy was true... You will bring an end to my Kremnoan dynasty.

t_ch: 拒绝？你错了，是死亡惧怕我。拜它所赐，我才有了这副钢铁之躯。
t_en: Defy? You're wrong. Death fears me. It's the reason I have this body of steel.

t_ch: 而你，你已病入膏肓了，父亲。将我抛入冥海的人是你，妄图奴役{RUBY_B#尼卡多利}泰坦{RUBY_E#}、亵渎神体的人也是你……
t_en: As for you, you already stand at death's door, father. You were the one who threw me into the Sea of Souls, the one who tried in vain to enslave a {RUBY_B#Nikador}Titan{RUBY_E#}, and the one who desecrated the body of a god...

t_ch: {RUBY_B#混账}HKS{RUBY_E#}！软弱的王，哪怕是最卑劣的鬣狗，也比你高贵千倍！
t_en: {RUBY_B#Scoundrel}HKS{RUBY_E#}! You're a weak king! So weak that even the lowliest hyena is a more noble existence than you!

t_ch: 而现在，命运的复仇找上你了！
t_en: And now, fate's reckoning is upon you!

t_ch: 那就挥剑吧！拿走我的王冠，用先王的血加冕，继承一切…名正言顺，成为悬锋的新王。
t_en: Then swing your blade! Take my crown, coronate yourself with an old king's blood, and inherit it all... Become the new rightful king of Kremnos.

t_ch: 不，我不要王冠。听好了——倘若悬锋的王只有一种宿命，那它对我毫无意义……
t_en: No, I don't want the crown. Listen — If there's only one end for the kings of Kremnos, then the crown means nothing to me...

t_ch: 我只要你的命！为了给母亲和同袍复仇，仅此而已！
t_en: All I want is your life! To avenge mother and my comrades!

t_ch: 但悬锋的城墙不会随我一同崩塌…吾儿，你以为自己逃得出命运的掌心？
t_en: But the walls of Kremnos will not fall with me. Do you truly think you can escape fate's grasp, my son?

t_ch: 哈哈哈…都一样，你和我…我们都把纷争和恐惧当做食粮……
t_en: Hahaha... You and I, we're both the same... We feast on strife and fear...

t_ch: …现在，杀了我！
t_en: ...Now, kill me!

t_ch: 歌耳戈之子，注定要浴血代冠——！
t_en: The son of Gorgo is destined to be crowned in blood!

t_ch: 克拉特鲁斯……
t_en: Krateros...

t_ch: 那家伙说，也许能从大工匠那得到建议…哈托努斯，去见他吧。
t_en: He said the Grand Craftsman Chartonus might have some suggestions. Might as well go see him.

t_ch: 大工匠，近来可好？
t_en: Grand Craftsman, how have you been?

t_ch: 悬锋的王，是你。你会来，我有预感。
t_en: King of Kremnos, it is. That you would come, I knew.

t_ch: 你知道我会来？
t_en: You knew I was coming?

t_ch: 我听说了，你的事。前进的方向，你在寻找；疑问，有许多。
t_en: Your matters, I've heard. The path forward, you seek. Many questions, you have.

t_ch: 但在那之前——这个，收下。
t_en: But before that... Take this.

t_ch: 这是…？
t_en: What's this...?

t_ch: 悬锋，王者的印戒，属于你母亲。重铸、修复…由我。
t_en: A signet ring. For the king of Kremnos. Belonged to your mother. Recast and restore it... I did.

t_ch: 母亲明明将它抛入冥海了……
t_en: What... Mother threw it into the Sea of Souls...

t_ch: 打捞，花了很久。运气很好，我们。
t_en: A long time to fish out, it took. Very fortunate, we were.

t_ch: 要从冥海中捞出一枚小小的印戒，我无法想象需要多少耐心和勇气。我欠你一个人情。
t_en: I can hardly imagine how much patience and courage it must have taken to find such a small signet ring in the Sea of Souls. I owe you one.

t_ch: 感谢，不必。你的救命之恩，我要报答。
t_en: Gratitude, there is no need for. Repayment for saving me, this is.

t_ch: 疑问，你带着它来。说吧，现在。
t_en: Questions, you bring with you. Ask, now.

t_ch: 我一直否定的命运，终于还是找上了门。
t_en: The fate I've always denied has finally caught up to me.

t_ch: 我理应接过「纷争」的权柄。如此一来，所有人都会满意：黄金裔、元老院、悬锋族人，还有谱写诗歌的吟游诗人……
t_en: By all rights, I should accept Strife's authority. It would make everyone happy: the Chrysos Heirs, the Council of Elders, the Kremnoans, even the bards who will write it all into song...

t_ch: 但还在犹豫，你。年轻的王，为何踌躇？
t_en: Yet hesitate still, you do. Hesitate, why do you, young king?

t_ch: …因为我的族人。
t_en: ...Because of my people.

t_ch: 男人、女人、长者、孩童…悬锋人对归乡的渴望深入心髓，他们一直在等待这天，企盼王者的归来。
t_en: Be they men, women, the elderly, or children... the hearts of all Kremnoans yearn for home. They've all been waiting for this day, for the day their king returns.

t_ch: 如此，纷争的子民便能够还乡，拥抱传统——即便他们中的大多数人只在史诗中听闻过那「传统」——然后，他们便能围绕在王的身旁，投身战场。
t_en: The children of Strife would then be able to go home and embrace the old traditions — never mind that most of them have only ever been heard in these so-called "traditions" in song. They would then gather around their king and throw themselves into battle.

t_ch: 这不是一件好事，你认为。
t_en: This is not a good thing, you believe.

t_ch: …过去的千年，悬锋人活在血腥的轮回里。复仇、征战、昌盛、衰败…那段历史中，多少无辜者的血汇入冥河，多少无谓的牺牲可以被避免？
t_en: ...The Kremnoans have been trapped in a cycle of bloodshed for the past one thousand years: They seek vengeance, start wars, become prosperous, then decline... How much innocent blood flowed into the River of Souls in all of those years? How many needless sacrifices could we have avoided?

t_ch: 若要我接受这命运，成为「纷争」的图腾，并带领我的族人重蹈覆辙…那我的确会感到恐惧，对「成王」的恐惧。
t_en: If I accept that fate and become the totem of Strife, then lead my people into repeating the same mistakes... then of course I would be terrified. I'd be terrified of becoming king.

t_ch: 不同的悬锋人，你果然是……
t_en: A different kind of Kremnoan, you truly are...

t_ch: （遐蝶说得对，先回去休息吧。估计迷迷也累坏了，一直都没出声。）
t_en: (Castorice is right. I should get some rest. Mem is probably exhausted too. {F#She hasn't}{M#They haven't} made a peep.)

t_ch: （不知道丹恒这些天如何……）
t_en: (I wonder how Dan Heng has been holding up these past few days.)

t_ch: （哦，看来过得不错。）
t_en: (Oh, he looks like he's been well.)

t_ch: 不久后 缇宝的房间
t_en: Moments later, in Tribbie's room...

t_ch: 妈妈，妈妈！我昨晚做了一个梦。
t_en: Momma, Momma! I had a dream last night.

t_ch: 哦？梦到什么了，缇里西庇俄丝，我的好女孩？
t_en: Oh? Now, what did you dream about, my darling Tribios?

t_ch: 我梦见自己变成了好多好多个！我们一起把月亮当做船，把星星当做帆，在海上漂来漂去。风吹向哪里，我们就漂到哪里！
t_en: I had a dream that I turned into many mes! Then we made the moon into a ship and made the stars into our sails! Then we floated on the ocean and let the wind blow us in any direction it wanted!

t_ch: 听起来是个美梦呢。
t_en: Well that sounds like a lovely dream.

t_ch: 是啊！虽然大海，还有天空，都好黑好黑。但是好多好多个我一点都不害怕，因为我们会一起唱歌！
t_en: Yeah! The ocean and the sky were really, really dark, but there were so many of me that I wasn't scared at all. Because we'd all sing together!

t_ch: 海风把我们送往一座小岛，那里的风有花朵的味道。还有绵羊咩咩，小鸟啾啾，欢迎我们去作客。岛上有好多动物，但大家从来不争吵！
t_en: The ocean wind blew us onto an island where the wind tasted like flowers. There were bleating sheep and chirping birds inviting us to be their guests. There were so many animals on the island, but none of them ever fought!

t_ch: {RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的圣女能聆听门神的指引，也许你梦见的，就是翁法罗斯某处仙境的景象哦。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}' Holy Maidens can receive guidance from the god of passages. Perhaps what you saw in your dream is a divine land somewhere in Amphoreus.

t_ch: …这、这样吗？
t_en: Y—You think so?

t_ch: 怎么了，缇里西庇俄丝，你好像不开心？
t_en: What's wrong, Tribios? You look unhappy.

t_ch: 因为…在那座小岛上，我还看见海的另一边有片黑色的山，很高很高。
t_en: Because... on that same island, I saw a dark mountain on the other side of the ocean. And it was very, very tall.

t_ch: 那山就像活着似的，一直在向小岛靠近。后来我才发现，那根本不是山，是很高很高的海浪…海浪拍在小岛上，像是要把它吃掉。小动物们想把它赶走，但根本拦不住……
t_en: The mountain looked alive, and it kept getting closer to the island. Then I realized that it wasn't a mountain, but a very, very tall wave made of water... When the wave smashed against the island, it looked like it was going to eat the island up. The small animals tried to chase it away, but they couldn't stop it...

t_ch: 最后「轰——！」的一下，我就醒了。
t_en: Then there was a "bang!" and I woke up.

t_ch: 嗯…黑色的海浪啊……
t_en: Hm... A dark wave...

t_ch: 妈妈，现实里有这么可怕的东西吗？
t_en: Momma, does something that scary exist in real life?

t_ch: 嗯…很遗憾，它确实存在于翁法罗斯，只是离我们的圣殿还很遥远。
t_en: Yes... Unfortunately, it does exist in Amphoreus, but it's very far away from our temple.

t_ch: 人们称之为「黑潮」，但其实和大海无关。它无形无貌，却能把动物、人、甚至泰坦一口吞下…把他们变成黑色的怪物。
t_en: We call it the "black tide," though it has nothing to do with water. It has no shape or form, but it can swallow up animals, humans, and even Titans... turning them all into monsters.

t_ch: 喔…黑潮好坏！我不想让大家变成它的小面包，有办法赶走这个家伙吗？
t_en: Ooh... The black tide is a baddie! I don't want everyone to turn into its food. Can't we chase it away?

t_ch: 当然了，好孩子。只是你要乖乖的，听大人的话，好好学习知识和礼仪，成长为合格的圣女……
t_en: Of course, my dear. You only need to behave well and listen to what the adults tell you, study all the knowledge and etiquette you need, then grow up and become a proper Holy Maiden...

t_ch: 神圣的{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}就会降下指引，让你为人们点明正确的道路。
t_en: The divine {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} will then give you guidance and help you light the way for the people.

t_ch: 呼哇…好好吃饭，好好学习，成为圣女！
t_en: Wow! I'm gonna eat a lot and study a lot and become a Holy Maiden!

t_ch: 可是，妈妈刚才说，黑潮也会吃掉泰坦…如果连{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}也被吃掉了，那该怎么办呢？
t_en: But, Momma, you said the black tide can swallow up Titans too. What do we do if even {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} is eaten?

t_ch: 那…就得由圣女来为人们指点迷津了。毕竟我们就是门神在人间的化身，对不对？
t_en: If that happens... then the Holy Maiden will have to be the one to guide people on the right path. After all, we are the human avatars of the god of passages, yeah?

t_ch: 对！
t_en: Yeah!

t_ch: 呵呵。不过，只有一个人是不够的。等你长大了，一定会遇见许多朋友。你要尽全力团结他们，这也是我们身为祭司的职责。
t_en: Hehe. But one person alone is not enough. Once you're older, you'll make a lot of friends. You must do your best to unite them because that's also our duty as priests.

t_ch: 朋友？他们都像妈妈和我一样，有好看的红头发吗？
t_en: Friends? Are they also like me and Momma, with pretty red hair?

t_ch: 这个不一定。但他们肯定和你一样聪明，一样善良。
t_en: They might not, but they'll certainly be just as smart and kind as you.
(Mama...)

t_ch: （我…在做梦吗？）
t_en: (Am I... dreaming?)

t_ch: 傻孩子，当然不是梦了。妈妈一直都在你的身边。
t_en: Don't be silly, dear. Of course you're not dreaming. I've always been by your side.
(What...)

t_ch: 我的好女孩，别闹别扭了。我们把{RUBY_B#玩偶娃娃}你的伙伴{RUBY_E#}也一起叫来——
t_en: Now be a good girl and call {RUBY_B#doll}your friends{RUBY_E#} over too...

t_ch: 就像平日那样，来玩「捉迷藏」，好不好？缇里西庇俄丝的脑瓜最聪明了，你肯定记得大家都躲在哪里。
t_en: Let's play hide-and-seek just like we used to, okay? My Tribios is the smartest girl. I'm sure you remember where everyone is hiding.

t_ch: （声音…好遥远。）
t_en: (The voice... sounds so far away.)

t_ch: 我…不记得了…我要找谁？
t_en: I don't... remember... Who am I looking for?

t_ch: 当然是要和你一起，赶走黑潮的同伴啦。
t_en: Your friends who will chase the black tide away alongside you, of course.

t_ch: 在那艘好大的船上，会有一位厉害的船长。她开朗乐观，胆大心细，能把大家联系在一起。
t_en: There will be an amazing captain on that big ship. She's cheerful, optimistic, bold, and cautious. She'll be able to get everyone together.

t_ch: 呼哇，好厉害！我可以当这个船长吗？
t_en: Wow, that's amazing! Can I be the captain?

t_ch: 当然可以。但我的好女孩，你会找到更合适的人选。
t_en: Of course you can! But you'll find someone else who's better for the job, my dear.

t_ch: 我想，那人应该住在一座华丽的神殿里，那神殿矗立在长满金色无花果树的山坡上。
t_en: I think that person lives in a beautiful temple that sits atop a hillside covered in golden fig trees.

t_ch: 那里有一位尊贵的女孩，她聪慧过人，但也细腻敏感。
t_en: There's a noble girl there who's very smart but also very delicate.

t_ch: 就像…妈妈一样？
t_en: Just like Momma...?

t_ch: 或许吧。不过在找到船长前，小船还需要一位领航的伙伴，她是谁呢？
t_en: Perhaps. But before we find the captain, the ship also needs someone who can navigate it. Who could that be?

t_ch: 呜，我想想……
t_en: Mmm... Let me think...

t_ch: 我知道了！她就是——「缇宝」！
t_en: I know! She's... "Tribbie"!

t_ch: （我给这个娃娃…取了和自己一样的名字？）
t_en: (I named this doll... after myself?)

t_ch: （完全不记得了…这是梦，还是发生过的事？）
t_en: (I don't remember at all... Is this a dream, or something that happened in the past?)

t_ch: （咦？这只娃娃，为什么在箱子里……）
t_en: (Huh? Why is this doll inside a chest...?)

t_ch: （它手里的是…剑？为什么……）
t_en: (It's holding a... sword? Why...)

t_ch: 很久以后，会有许多勇敢的战士登上这艘船。他们武艺高强，不畏艰险。
t_en: Many years later, many brave warriors will board this ship. They are skilled combatants who fear no danger.

t_ch: 唔…我也可以学着战斗，保护大家！
t_en: Ooh... I can learn how to fight too and protect everybody!

t_ch: 傻孩子，你是雅努萨波利斯的圣女。战斗不是你的职责，会有许多人来保护你的。
t_en: Silly girl, you're Janusopolis' Holy Maiden. It's not your duty to fight. There will be many others to protect you.

t_ch: 好吧，那他们都来自哪里呢？
t_en: Alright, then where will they come from?

t_ch: 我想，其中一位战士来自蔺草遍野的美丽村庄，还有一位来自宏伟的王城。他们都有各自的烦恼，但也愿意为小船的远航献出力量。
t_en: I believe one warrior hails from a lovely village where bulrushes flourish, while another comes from a magnificent royal city. Though each has their own troubles, both are ready to lend their strength for the ship's long voyage.

t_ch: 既然这样，就让「缇安」和他们并肩作战吧！
t_en: In that case, let "Trianne" fight by their side!

t_ch: 这样，大家就不会迷茫了！
t_en: This way, they'll always stay on course!

t_ch: （我当时…怎么会知道「缇安」这个名字？）
t_en: (How could I have known the name "Trianne" back then?)

t_ch: （是巧合，还是……）
t_en: (Was it just a coincidence, or...)

t_ch: 在海上航行，一定要上知天文，下知地理。
t_en: When navigating at sea, you need to know both astronomy and geography.

t_ch: 呜…只学习{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的知识还不够吗？
t_en: Ugh... isn't {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}' knowledge enough?

t_ch: 当然啦。大海不是陆地，一不小心就会迷失方向。所以，学会辨认{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的神迹可是很重要的。
t_en: Oh, sweetie. The ocean isn't like the land. It's easy to get lost. That's why it's important to learn to recognize the miracle of {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 好吧！虽然我的脑瓜已经特别特别聪明了，但我还是会努力！
t_en: Alright! Even though my brain is already super-duper smart, I'll still try my very best!

t_ch: {RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}也会眷顾认真的孩子。它会派出知识渊博的学者，当大家的老师，帮助你实现理想。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} also favors children who try their best. They will send a wise scholar as everyone's teacher to help you reach your dreams.

t_ch: 我也想当老师！不对，我很厉害，所以要当老师的老师！
t_en: I wanna be a teacher too! Oh, wait, I'm super-duper smart! So I wanna be the teacher's teacher!

t_ch: 为什么不呢？不过，如果想要教书育人，这么好动可不行。
t_en: Why not? But if you're going to be a teacher, you might need to tone down that hyper energy of yours.

t_ch: 那…就让「缇宁」来！她很乖，肯定能做个好老师。
t_en: Then... "Trinnon" can do it! She's well-behaved and would make a great teacher.

t_ch: （妈妈、还有大家，以前总会夸我记性好……）
t_en: (Mama and the others always said I had a great memory...)

t_ch: （可现在…我连这是梦还是记忆…都分不清了。）
t_en: (But now... I can't even tell if this is a memory or a dream...)

t_ch: （一块黑板？上面画的是……）
t_en: (A blackboard? And what is that drawing...?)

t_ch: （完全没印象。或许是小时候的涂鸦吧。）
t_en: (It doesn't ring a bell at all. Perhaps it's just a childhood doodle.)

t_ch: （满满当当的…好像都是妈妈留给我的。）
t_en: (It's packed full... Mama must have left all of these for me.)

t_ch: （字都被抹掉了…是因为记不清了么？）
t_en: (All the words are blurred out... Could it be that my memory is fading?)

t_ch: （以前总在这里，听妈妈讲故事……）
t_en: (I used to sit here and listen to Mama tell stories...)

t_ch: （好想再见你一面…妈妈。）
t_en: (Oh, how I wish to see you again... Mama.)

t_ch: 好啦，缇里西庇俄丝，让大家坐在这只小八音盒上，为我们的歌谣谱写旋律吧。
t_en: Now, Tribios, set them on this music box and let them compose a melody for our song.

t_ch: 小…八音盒？那是什么……
t_en: M—Music box? What's that?

t_ch: 好孩子，睡糊涂了吗？这可是你的发明呀。
t_en: Sweetheart, are you still groggy from your nap? You invented it!

t_ch: 发明…我的？它有什么用？
t_en: I... invented it? What does it do?

t_ch: 我的好缇宝…你平时那么聪明，怎么今天看起来呆呆的？
t_en: Oh, my lovely Tribbie, you're usually so bright! What's gotten into you today?

t_ch: 既然这样，不如眼见为实…把好伙伴们放上来，看看会有什么奇妙的反应吧。
t_en: Well, you might as well see for yourself. Put your good friends on it and see the wonders it can do.

t_ch: （把娃娃放上去……）
t_en: (Put the dolls on...)

t_ch: 放上娃娃
t_en: Place the dolls

t_ch: 转起来了！还有声音……
t_en: It's rotating! And I can hear something...

t_ch: 没错，八音盒。只要在合适的位置放上娃娃，触发机关，它就会转动，演奏出好听的乐曲……
t_en: That's right! It's a music box. If you place the dolls in the right spots, it will start rotating and play beautiful music...

t_ch: …这也是你所有发明里，妈妈最喜欢的。
t_en: ...Out of all your inventions, this one is my favorite.

t_ch: 我…不记得了……
t_en: I don't... remember...

t_ch: 没关系，好孩子。让妈妈就着旋律唱出歌谣，你就全部想起来啦。
t_en: It's alright, my child. I'll sing along to the tune, and it will help jog your memories.

t_ch: 「神明眷顾沃土，遍地欣欣如火。十二星宿如目，巨人举杯对酌。」
t_en: "Happiness abounded in this lush land by gods chosen. Giants raised their glasses in a toast beheld by the twelve constellations."

t_ch: 「三者开辟天地，三者编织命运。三者捏塑生命，三者引渡灾祸。」
t_en: "Three carved the heavens and the earth, three wove the threads of fate. Three molded life with their hands, and three guided calamity's gate."

t_ch: 「它们说：世界太过沉寂。只愿见，生灵欢笑不息。」
t_en: "They declared the world too unstirring, hence wished endless laughter upon the living."

t_ch: 「于是便有了我、你，编织言语和歌谣，诞下爱情与知己。」
t_en: "Thus you and I were created, with words and song to weave, and love and intimacy to give."

t_ch: 「自此，创生已毕。谁来背负灵魂的重，换取世人步伐之轻？」
t_en: "Thus, creation was complete, who then will bear the weight of humanity's souls, to lighten the steps of the living as a whole?"

t_ch: 「伟岸的刻法勒，全知的父，它身躯伟岸，却甘将眼睑垂低。」
t_en: "O great Kephale, all-knowing father of stature so tall, yet low does their gaze willingly fall."

t_ch: 「黎明的光沉负于肩，金色的血落向大地。」
t_en: "With light of dawn heavy upon their shoulders, golden blood spills unto the land..."

t_ch: 「汇作一条滚烫的河，流遍世间英雄末裔。」
t_en: "Converge into a boiling river that flows to the heroic heirs of this world."

t_ch: 这是…怎么了？
t_en: Wh—What's going on?

t_ch: 「雅努斯呵█ 敬请聆听█ █！」
t_en: "O Janus █, please lend me your ears █ █!"

t_ch: 「黑色的迷雾中，死亡与命运已近█ 血染的大地上，死者与生灵寻津█ █」
t_en: "In the black mist, as death and fate draw close. █n the bloodied earth, the living and dead, but g█o█ts."

t_ch: 「人世为何█ 一如你迷宫般面貌█ 人生为何█ 一同你悲鸣，无声亦无回音█ █」
t_en: "What is this world█ It mirrors your maze-like fa█e. What is this world? A █ilent lament, without a tra██."

t_ch: 「退路为何█ 空余死灵彷徨█ 前路为何█ █独听生灵离别█ ██」
t_en: "What is the past█ Wandering ghosts that linge█. What is the future? ██uls scattered by fate's f█n██r."

t_ch: 「起点为何█ 徒留来人孑遗█ 终点为何█ ██惟见只影孤立█ ██ █」
t_en: "What is the start█ A voyage born in solitud█. What is the end█ A sp██it, lonely and s█b██e█."
"Lonely and subdued █nd subdue█ and subdue█ subdue█ subdu██ subdued ██b███d ███d███"

t_ch: 缇安…缇宁…！
t_en: Trianne... Trinnon...!

t_ch: 妈妈…发生什么了…？
t_en: Mama, what's going on...?

t_ch: 快█逃█ █ 缇里西庇俄丝█ ██快逃███  █ ██ █
t_en: Hurry! █un! █ █ Tribios, █ ██ run! ███ █ ██ █
The black tide ██ █ has █ ██ █ arrived █ ██ ███ █ ██!

t_ch: （我该…我该逃到哪里？）
t_en: (Where... can I go?)

t_ch: 为什么……
t_en: Why...

t_ch: 为什么…到处都是娃娃…？！
t_en: Why... are there dolls everywhere!?
This ██ is █ the sacrifice █ ██ of a Holy Maiden.███ █ ██ █
You █ won't █ █ make █ ██ it to the end.███ █ ██ █

t_ch: 惟█有一人█ █ 能走到█ ██ 最后███  █ █
t_en: Only █ one █ █ person █ ██ can.███ █ █

t_ch: 我知道…我知道…！
t_en: I know... I know!

t_ch: 走不到最后也没事…*我们*已经下定决心！
t_en: It's fine if we can't reach the end... Our minds are made up!

t_ch: 去道别吧█ █ 缇里西██ █庇俄丝███  █ █
t_en: Go █ █ bid your farewells, Tri ██ █bios███ █ █
Time ██ █is running█ out.███ ██ █ ██ █ █

t_ch: 什么…你要离开了么，妈妈……
t_en: Mama... Are you going to leave me?
My sweet girl, ██ I █ will never █ leave you.██ ██ █ ██ █ █

t_ch: 但要记得█ █缇里西庇俄丝█ ███ ██ █ █
t_en: But remember this, █ █ Tribios...█ ███ ██ █ █

t_ch: {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>只有一人能活到最后，见证「再创世」</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>「众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹——」</color>{RUBY_E#}
t_en: {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Only one shall live till the end, and they alone will witness Era Nova</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>"All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle —"</color>{RUBY_E#}

t_ch: 既然心意已决，就穿越黑潮，为翁法罗斯拨开迷雾吧……
t_en: Since your mind is made up, then traverse the black tide and dispel the fog for Amphoreus...

t_ch: 明天见，我亲爱的缇里西庇俄丝。
t_en: I shall see you tomorrow, my dearest Tribios.

t_ch: （这是我…童年的事吗？想不起来了……）
t_en: (Is this... from my childhood? I don't remember...)

t_ch: 用纺锤，连系大家！
t_en: Use the spindle to connect everyone!

t_ch: 坏箱子，关不住我！
t_en: Bad chest, you can't lock me away!

t_ch: 学习，改变命运！
t_en: Learning can change your destiny!

t_ch: 来，让它们排排坐好吧。
t_en: Come, let's line them up.

t_ch: 这是什么…？！
t_en: What's this...!?

t_ch: <size=36>妈妈…！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Mama...!</size>

t_ch: …*我们*还在梦里吗？
t_en: ...Are we still in a dream?

t_ch: 做噩梦了么？
t_en: Did you have a nightmare?

t_ch: …或许吧。明明*我们*已经好久没做过梦了。
t_en: ...Maybe. But it's been a long time since we had any dreams.

t_ch: 现在还未到{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}，你还可以休息很久。
t_en: It's not yet the {RUBY_B#dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#}. You still have plenty of time to rest.

t_ch: 不了…*我们*的心脏还在怦怦跳呢。
t_en: No... Our heart is still racing.

t_ch: 许是那粗鲁的悬锋老兵让缇宁受了惊吓，也连带影响了你。若你有意，我现在就可以用金线荡破他的胸膛。
t_en: It must be that reckless Kremnoan soldier who startled Trinnon — and you as well. If you want, I can pierce through his chest with the golden thread right now.

t_ch: 阿雅…！别总说这种吓人的话……
t_en: Agy...! Cut it out with the scary talk...

t_ch: 这是玩笑话。若有必要，我不会等到现在。
t_en: I'm just kidding. If I were serious, I wouldn't have waited until now.
Ah...

t_ch: 想聊聊那场梦么？若长久郁结心中，容易落成病根。
t_en: Do you want to talk about the dream? Keeping it bottled up is not good for your health.

t_ch: *我们*…梦到妈妈了。
t_en: We... had a dream about Mama.

t_ch: 不过，梦本身没什么…只是无缘无故在这时做梦，令人有些不安。
t_en: The dream itself was nothing... It's just the timing that feels a bit unsettling.

t_ch: 你指的是……
t_en: You mean...

t_ch: …就是缇安。
t_en: ...It's Trianne.

t_ch: 就算*我们*从今往后，再也不使用「百界门」的力量…她的魂息也在慢慢飘离身体。
t_en: Even if we refrain from ever using the power of the Century Gate again... her soul continues to slowly drift away from her body.

t_ch: 时间…恐怕已经所剩无几了。
t_en: There isn't much time left.

t_ch: 或许…让她提前让渡「门匠」的职责，就作为一个普通的孩子无忧无虑地活到最后，也不失为一件好事。
t_en: Perhaps... it wouldn't be such a bad idea to let her relinquish her role as the "gatekeeper" and live out her days as a carefree child.

t_ch: 我理解你的想法，阿雅。但在这件事上…*我们*已经下定决心。
t_en: You have a point, Agy. But... our decision has already been made on that matter.

t_ch: 我想，此事还有回旋的余地。
t_en: I believe there's still another way.

t_ch: 灵魂磨损，直至归于尘土，那就是*我们*的命运。
t_en: Souls will be spent until they dissolve into dust — such is our fate.

t_ch: 曾经，*我们*也有完整相连的身体。如果把那副躯体比作大树，那么树干和枝叶都会因命运使然，以相同的速度凋零。
t_en: Once, we had a whole and connected body. If that body were a tree, then its trunk and branches would share the same fate, decaying at the same pace.

t_ch: 现在，*我们*分成了许许多多个自己…虽然失去了树干，却也多了一种选择……
t_en: Now, we are fragmented into numerous selves... Despite the absence of a trunk, we are offered another possibility...

t_ch: …*我们*能以对逐火之旅最有益的方式，决定枝叶以何种形式腐朽。
t_en: ...We can choose how our branches will perish in a way that is most beneficial to the Flame-Chase Journey.

t_ch: 比起与一人道别…看着许多人在眼前陆续消逝更令人伤怀。
t_en: Compared with saying farewell to one person... watching many fade away before me is even more sorrowful.

t_ch: 可…毕竟<color=#dbc291ff>「前进」</color>是{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}试炼注定的结果，*我们*从来没有退路可言。
t_en: But "advancing" is the destined end of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus'{RUBY_E#} trial. There's no retreat in our path.

t_ch: 不要为和*我们*道别伤怀——我们早就约定好了，对不对？
t_en: Don't feel sad about saying goodbye to us. We have already agreed on this, right?

t_ch: 用不了多久，我可能就品尝不出悲伤的滋味了。
t_en: It won't be long before I forget what sorrow tastes like.

t_ch: 阿雅，你早餐想吃什么？
t_en: So, what would you like for breakfast, Agy?

t_ch: 什么？怎么突然……
t_en: What? Where did that come from...?

t_ch: 聊了这么久，肚子有点饿啦。况且，不是快到{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}了嘛。
t_en: After all this talking, we are feeling a bit hungry. Plus, it's nearly the {RUBY_B#dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#} now.

t_ch: 说到这个，阿雅，你还记得吗？应该是刚见面不久的时候，你也还是个小不点，半夜嘴馋偷吃燕麦粥被*我们*逮住……
t_en: Do you remember when we first met, Agy? You were still a little one, and we caught you secretly eating oatmeal late at night...

t_ch: 呵…我的情感在流逝，但那些片段——我全都记得，吾师。
t_en: Heh, while my emotions might be fading, those memories are still as vivid as ever, teacher.

t_ch: 还是我去吧。你想吃些什么？
t_en: Please, let me do it. What would you like to eat?

t_ch: 不用不用，交给*我们*。你先休息会儿，很快的，*我们*准备好了就来叫你。
t_en: It's fine. Leave it to us. You should rest for now. It won't take long, and we will call you once it's done.

t_ch: …好，那就麻烦你了。
t_en: ...In that case, thank you.

t_ch: 那…明早见，阿雅！
t_en: Then... See you tomorrow, Agy!

t_ch: （话是这么说，但噩梦是个坏兆头。记忆越来越模糊不清了，连妈妈的样子都……）
t_en: (Nevertheless, that nightmare is ominous. Memories are slipping away... even the image of Mama...)

t_ch: （果然…还是得先去趟<color=#dbc291ff>命运重渊</color>才行。希望{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}愿意帮帮*我们*。）
t_en: (Just as expected, another trip must be made to the Abyss of Fate. Hopefully, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} will be willing to help us.)

t_ch: 与此同时 奥赫玛某处
t_en: At the same time, somewhere in Okhema

t_ch: 那刻夏老师，好久不见。
t_en: Long time no see, Professor Anaxa.

t_ch: 你是谁？
t_en: Who are you?

t_ch: 久违了，我是那个在灵魂物理学的课堂上掀翻了教室的学生。
t_en: It's been a while. I'm the one who once overthrew the entire classroom in that spiritual physics lecture.

t_ch: 哦，是你啊。
t_en: Oh, it's you.

t_ch: 不是吧，老师，我就随口一说…你真记得这事？
t_en: No way... Do you really still remember that, professor?

t_ch: 还记得你的油嘴滑舌。找我做什么，可不只是为了叙旧吧？
t_en: I remember that glib tongue of yours. What brings you here? Surely you're not looking to reminisce.

t_ch: 这你都看出来了？
t_en: You could tell?

t_ch: 当然，你只有在别有企图时，才会这么拐弯抹角。
t_en: Of course. You only beat around the bush when you have a hidden agenda.

t_ch: 哪里的话。我可是来诚心求教的，一如既往……
t_en: That's not true. I'm here to seek enlightenment, as always...

t_ch: 还请不吝赐教：有关您所知的，那位黑袍剑士的一切。
t_en: Could you please teach me everything you know about the black-robed swordmaster?

t_ch: 哼，流言传得真快啊。
t_en: Hmph. Rumors sure travel fast.

t_ch: 可惜，我对它也一无所知，能告诉你的：只有它身披黑袍，手持重剑…大概是重剑吧，形如半轮扭曲的太阳……
t_en: Unfortunately I, too, know nothing about it. I can only tell you that it is clad in a black robe and wields a greatsword... At least, it looks like a greatsword. It's shaped like a twisted half-sun...

t_ch: 还有一柄古怪的匕首，如同一弯新月。
t_en: And a peculiar dagger resembling a crescent moon.

t_ch: 对了，这个拿去——
t_en: By the way, take this with you—

t_ch: 偷袭时得手的战利品，送你了。
t_en: I got it from the sneak attack. It's yours now.

t_ch: 不会错…就是它。烧毁了哀丽秘榭…杀害所有人的凶手。
t_en: I was right... It is this thing. The one who torched Aedes Elysiae to the ground... and killed everyone.

t_ch: 奉劝你别逞英雄。眼下的奥赫玛，恐怕没人是它的对手。
t_en: Don't try to be a hero. No one in Okhema stands a chance against that thing right now.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#「理性」之泰坦，瑟希斯}那位泰坦{RUBY_E#}也是这么说的？
t_en: Is that what {RUBY_B#Cerces, the Reason Titan}the Titan{RUBY_E#} said as well?

t_ch: 哼，开始不是，但领教到它的厉害后也甘拜下风了。就算请神上身，我也难以招架对方的锋刃……
t_en: Hmph, not at first. But the god relented after having had a taste of its power. Even with a god possessing me, I couldn't fight against that blade...

t_ch: 那不可思议的力量，不像是任何一位泰坦的赐福。
t_en: That incredible power doesn't seem to be granted by any Titan.

t_ch: 你想主张…它来自翁法罗斯之外？
t_en: Are you suggesting that... it originates from beyond Amphoreus?

t_ch: 不无可能。就跟黑潮一样，不是么？
t_en: It's possible. Much like the black tide, no?

t_ch: …无论如何，那是我们必须战胜的敌人。
t_en: ...Nonetheless, it's an enemy we must overcome.

t_ch: 我们？别异想天开了，白厄，没人想看你横死在它的剑下。
t_en: We? Drop the pipe dream, Phainon. No one wants to see you fall by their blade.

t_ch: 只要那家伙存在，就会威胁到圣城，还有逐火的征程。
t_en: Their mere presence will endanger the holy city and the Flame-Chase.

t_ch: 你知道我根本不信——
t_en: You know that I don't believe—

t_ch: ——你不相信所谓的神谕，我知道。但我来寻求你的帮助，不是出于阿格莱雅或缇宝的命令……
t_en: —You don't believe in the so-called prophecy. I know. However, I'm here to seek your assistance, not at the request of Aglaea or Tribbie...

t_ch: 我只想为自己发誓保护的城邦除掉一个祸端，仅此而已。树庭的惨剧，绝不能再度上演。
t_en: I just want to eliminate a threat to the city I pledged to protect. That's all. The tragedy at the Grove must never happen again.

t_ch: 坐吧。既然你诚心求教……
t_en: Take a seat. Since you are sincerely seeking enlightenment...

t_ch: 那我就再告诉你一件事。
t_en: I suppose I can tell you one more thing.

t_ch: 不久后 命运重渊
t_en: Soon after, in the Abyss of Fate
Mmm...

t_ch: 怎么了，缇安？
t_en: What's wrong, Trianne?

t_ch: 没什么！只是…又想起树庭的事。
t_en: Nothing! Just... remembering what happened at the Grove.

t_ch: 黑色斗篷的怪物，很可怕。大家，遇到危险…噩梦，忘不掉。
t_en: Monster in the black cloak, so scary. Everyone, in danger... Nightmare, can't forget.

t_ch: 乖…这里没有坏人。缇安，你不是用「百界门」保护了大家吗？
t_en: Don't be scared... There are no bad guys here. Didn't you save everyone with the Century Gate, Trianne?

t_ch: 缇安，把它丢到了很远的地方，远远的，再也回不来。
t_en: Trianne threw it away. Far, far away. It's never coming back.

t_ch: 树庭之行平安无事，这都是缇安的功劳。多亏有你在，逐火之旅才能平稳地继续。
t_en: We got back safe from the Grove because of you, Trianne. You're the reason the Flame-Chase Journey can continue.

t_ch: 对不起，缇安…有点晕晕的，*我们*为什么要来这里？
t_en: Sorry, Trianne feels... a bit dizzy. Why are we here again?

t_ch: 当然是为了同样的事。记得吗？明天，*我们*要为大家揭示神谕的过往。
t_en: For the same thing, of course. Remember? Tomorrow, we will reveal the prophecy's past to everyone.

t_ch: 可在那之前，必须先擦亮因为分裂而变得浑浊不清的记忆，*我们*希望能将真相原原本本地呈现给大家，而不是有所隐瞒。
t_en: But first, we need to restore the memories that have been blurred by the fragmentation. We hope to present the full truth to everyone, without hiding anything.

t_ch: 但分裂毕竟是{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的影响，也只有同为泰坦的{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}能帮*我们*了。
t_en: Since {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} caused the fragmentation, we can only turn to another Titan, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, for help.

t_ch: 还有…别忘了在{RUBY_B#清晨}明晰时{RUBY_E#}前为阿雅备好早餐。
t_en: Also... remember to get breakfast ready for Agy before the {RUBY_B#Morning}Lucid Hour{RUBY_E#} tomorrow!

t_ch: 喔！是这么回事，缇安都想起来了！
t_en: Ah, yes! Trianne remembers now!

t_ch: 说到这个…在觐见泰坦前，*我们*最好准备一些「番红蕊」。
t_en: Oh, on that note... we had better prepare some "saffron" before we meet with the Titan.

t_ch: 番红蕊？哦…那是三相殿祭祀仪式的必需品，你是觉得不能空手去见{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}？
t_en: Saffron? Ah, it's an essential offering for rituals in the Temple of the Three Fates. You think we shouldn't go to {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} empty-handed?

t_ch: 嗯。它也是雅努萨波利斯的象征物之一。如果要复现记忆，*我们*最好能有一些历经当年岁月的事物做基底……
t_en: Yes. It's also a symbol of Janusopolis. If we are to replicate memories, we need to use something that has experienced those days...

t_ch: 以及，和阿雅第一次见面时，*我们*为她做的粥里就放了这个，她很爱吃。
t_en: And when we first met Agy, we added that to the porridge we made for her, and she really loved it!

t_ch: 原来如此，一举三得！
t_en: I see! It's like killing three birds with one stone!

t_ch: 不过…前提是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}愿意帮助*我们*。
t_en: But... it all depends on whether {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} is willing to help us.

t_ch: 这…确实是个问题。
t_en: This... could be a problem.

t_ch: 毕竟，当年夺走了它至亲{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}火种的人…就是*我们*。
t_en: After all, it was us who took the Coreflame from {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}... From Oronyx's kin.

t_ch: 只能先试试看了。如果真的无路可走……
t_en: We will have to give it a try. If there is truly no other way...

t_ch: …以*我们*现在的状态，恐怕也没法对它做什么。到时再想想其他办法吧……
t_en: ...In our current state, we probably can't do anything to them. We'll cross that bridge when we get there...

t_ch: 到时候，可以交给缇安，缇安最会卖可怜了！
t_en: Leave it to Trianne. Trianne knows how to play cute!

t_ch: 总之，先去找番红蕊吧，但愿神殿里还有存储，没有被{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的士兵毁掉。
t_en: In any case, let's look for saffron first. I hope there's still some left in the temple, untouched by {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} soldiers.

t_ch: 我记得，熟成的番红蕊都是装在瓮里密封起来的……
t_en: I remember that aged saffron is preserved in sealed jars...

t_ch: 好壮观，好大的房间！
t_en: Wow! This room is huge!

t_ch: 缇宁，你刚才……
t_en: Trinnon, did you...

t_ch: 嗯，看到了。那是…{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}在警告*我们*吗？
t_en: Yeah, I saw it. Was that... a warning from {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}?

t_ch: 缇宝，缇宁，你们在说什么悄悄话呢？
t_en: What are you two whispering about, Tribbie? Trinnon?

t_ch: （缇安，连*我们*自己的交流也感应不到了吗……）
t_en: (Trianne can't even hear our own telecommunication?)

t_ch: 不说这个了，缇安忽然觉得，这里好像很熟悉！
t_en: Well, never mind. Trianne suddenly feels like this place is quite familiar!

t_ch: 房间里，好像有「翻红瑞」的气息，就在…那里！
t_en: There's a whiff of "safari" in this room. It's... right over there!

t_ch: 就在这儿！「我呼唤你，欧洛尼斯——激起往昔的涟漪！」
t_en: Right here! "I summon thee, Oronyx! Stir up ripples of past reverie!"

t_ch: …好像有什么出现了！
t_en: ...Something's appeared!

t_ch: 稍等，*我们*来辨认一下……
t_en: Wait, we should read it first...

t_ch: 这…是一封信吗？倒是提到了「番红蕊」，但还有…「缇里西庇俄丝」？
t_en: Wait, this is... a letter? It mentions something about "saffron" and... "Tribios"?

t_ch: 这个名字，不就是……
t_en: Isn't that name...

t_ch: …先不说这个，这封信为什么会出现在这里？缇安又是怎么感应到的……
t_en: ...Never mind that for now. Why is this letter here? And how did Trianne sense it?

t_ch: 难道…这是*我们*丢失的记忆？
t_en: Could it be... our lost memories?

t_ch: 莫非，*我们*已经被{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}发现，踏入了它的考验？
t_en: Is it possible that we were already noticed by {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} and entered their trial?

t_ch: 可是它为什么一言不发？
t_en: But why haven't they said a word?

t_ch: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的性格反复无常，就像是一名孩童。也许…是存心想要作弄*我们*吧。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} has the whims of a child. Perhaps... they're toying with us on purpose.

t_ch: 缇宝，缇宁！这回找到啦，这是那个「翻红瑞」吗？
t_en: Tribbie! Trinnon! Look what I found! Is this the "safari"?

t_ch: 来啦，*我们*看看……
t_en: Coming! We'll take a look...

t_ch: …缇安，这里什么都没有啊？
t_en: ...But Trianne, there's nothing in here.

t_ch: 什么！明明就在这个陶罐里……
t_en: What? It was right in this dolium...

t_ch: 咦，真的什么都没有？不可能，刚刚还看到了……
t_en: Huh? There's really nothing here? That can't be! I swear I saw it...

t_ch: 真的！缇安没骗人…刚才还有的，怎么突然就不见了呢？
t_en: I swear! Trianne is telling the truth! It was right there — where did it go?

t_ch: 缇宁、缇宝，为什么不说话？从刚才开始，缇安就听不见*你们*的声音了……
t_en: Trinnon, Tribbie, why aren't you saying anything? Trianne can't seem to hear you at all...

t_ch: …因为*我们*在发呆呢，缇安。别紧张。
t_en: ...We were just lost in our thoughts. Don't worry, Trianne.

t_ch: 你看到的，或许是只雅努萨野兔，被*我们*吓到就一溜烟跑走了。
t_en: What you saw was likely a Janus hare. We must have startled it away.

t_ch: …好吧。
t_en: ...Okay.

t_ch: 这是…打算动摇*我们*吗？{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}为什么要做这种事？
t_en: Could {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} be trying to make us falter? But why would they do that?

t_ch: 不对劲…缇宝，你有没有觉得，神殿有些太安静了？
t_en: Something feels off... Tribbie, don't you think the temple is a little too quiet?

t_ch: 什么意思？
t_en: What do you mean?

t_ch: 也许只是错觉，缇宁只是在想……
t_en: It might just be an illusion, but Trinnon wonders...

t_ch: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}…真的是在考验*我们*吗？
t_en: Is {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}... really putting us through a trial?

t_ch: 这…怎么回事？
t_en: Wh—What's going on?

t_ch: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}…消失了？
t_en: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}... disappeared?

t_ch: 不久前 奥赫玛
t_en: Not long ago, in Okhema

t_ch: 你是说…这黑袍剑士不仅与黑潮有关，还在四处猎取火种？
t_en: Are you saying that the black-robed swordmaster is not just tied to the black tide... but is also hunting for Coreflames everywhere?

t_ch: 这个猜想的可能性最大。第一，它持有火种的容器；第二，我也是它的目标之一。
t_en: This is the most plausible possibility. First, it has a vessel that can hold Coreflames. Second, I'm one of its targets.

t_ch: 先说第一条论据：它那造型古怪的「仪式剑」能和火种相互作用——刺入我胸口时的引力就是证明。我猜测那柄剑具备感应、吸收…甚至容纳火种的能力。
t_en: Let's start with the first premise. Its peculiar "ceremonial blade" can interact with the Coreflame, as evidenced by the pull I felt when it stabbed into my chest. I hypothesize that the blade can sense, absorb... or even retain Coreflames.

t_ch: 第二条论据就更直接了：它早前陷入混战时，虽然多有分心，但从始至终都在盯着我，或者说，我体内的{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: The second premise is even more explicit. When it was engaged in fierce battle with many of us and was heavily distracted, it remained consistently focused on me — or rather, on the Titan {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} inside me.

t_ch: 呵，原来是个盗火者……
t_en: Heh, so it's plundering the flames...

t_ch: 但要是如你所说，它岂不是很快就会冲着奥赫玛来？创世涡心可是摆满了泰坦的火种。
t_en: But if your argument holds up, wouldn't they be headed to Okhema soon? The Vortex of Genesis is full of the Titans' Coreflames.

t_ch: 未必。我们暂且将此人称为「盗火行者」。假设推测成立，此人的目标共有三处。
t_en: Not necessarily. Let's call that person the "Flame Reaver" for now. If my presumption holds, that person has three targets.

t_ch: 一是我本人；二是仍未陨落的{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}；三是保管诸神火种的奥赫玛和创世涡心。
t_en: The first target is me. The second target is {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, who hasn't yet fallen. And the third is Okhema and the Vortex of Genesis, where the Coreflames are housed.

t_ch: 不过，我猜奥赫玛不会是首选。{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的火种有元老院的秘法管控，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的水幕应该也足以隔断外界的感应。
t_en: But I suspect Okhema won't be their first target. {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame is guarded by the Council of Elders' arcane power, and {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa's{RUBY_E#} water curtain should be able to block out any external perceptions.

t_ch: 那{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}和{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}呢？它们的火种也还没归位……
t_en: What about {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}? Their Coreflames are yet to be restored...

t_ch: {RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}去向成谜，无人知晓它的所在。至于{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}……
t_en: The whereabouts of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} remain a mystery to all. As for {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}...

t_ch: 你会飞吗？
t_en: Can you fly?

t_ch: 不会。问这个做什么？
t_en: No, I can't. Why are you asking that?

t_ch: 那名剑士会飞吗？
t_en: Can that swordmaster fly?

t_ch: …啊，说的也是。可万一它肋下生翼……
t_en: ...Ah, good point. But what if they do grow wings...

t_ch: 它若生有羽翼，我就不可能从树庭活着回来。
t_en: If they had wings, I wouldn't have made it out of the Grove alive.

t_ch: 那还真该庆幸啊。那么，既然盗火行者可能的目标有二，我们更得加快动作了……
t_en: That's a relief. Anyway, since the Flame Reaver has two targets, we need to move fast...

t_ch: 考虑到奥赫玛、树庭和这几处目标地点的距离，我想，最应该设防的是……
t_en: With the distances between Okhema, the Grove, and these potential targets, I believe we should bolster our defense in...

t_ch: 不好了，白厄——
t_en: Bad news, Phainon—

t_ch: ——缇宝失踪了！她们最后一次被人目击到是在……
t_en: — Tribbie is missing! The last time the three of them were seen was in...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>命运重渊</color>！
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The Abyss of Fate</color>!

t_ch: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}——
t_en: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} —

t_ch: 你在这里吗——？
t_en: Are you in here —?

t_ch: 没反应……
t_en: No response at all...

t_ch: 是预感到了*我们*会来，躲进迷雾中了吗？还是……
t_en: Did they foresee that we were coming and hide in the fog? Or...

t_ch: 缇宝…*我们*恐怕得走了。这座神殿里……
t_en: Tribbie... We should leave. This temple...

t_ch: …还有其他人在。
t_en: ...Has other people in it.

t_ch: 什么？！
t_en: What!?

t_ch: 听——脚步声，很急促，有三、四个人，正在往这边赶来。
t_en: Listen — footsteps, fast ones. Three or four people, coming this way.

t_ch: 先找个地方藏起来。无论对方是谁，*我们*都不能被看见。
t_en: Come on, we need to hide! Whoever they are, we can't let them see us!

t_ch: 缇宝、缇宁…快过来看看。
t_en: Tribbie, Trinnon... Come check this out.

t_ch: 这是什么？
t_en: What's this?

t_ch: 总觉得…缇安在哪里见过？
t_en: Trianne feels like... it's so familiar.

t_ch: 边走边摸索，找找看吧。
t_en: Let's be on the lookout as we go.

t_ch: 「前方是绝路——回头，吾师。」
t_en: "It's a dead end ahead — turn back, teacher."

t_ch: 什么，阿雅…不，幻觉？
t_en: What, Agy? No, it's an illusion!

t_ch: 这边这边！跟缇安来——
t_en: Over here! Follow Trianne—

t_ch: 缇安…慢点……
t_en: Trianne... Slow down...

t_ch: 「即便离别注定，无谓赴死也绝非正途。」
t_en: "Even if separation is our fate, a futile death is not the solution."

t_ch: 又出现了……
t_en: It appeared again...

t_ch: 真是的…玩闹也要看场合呀。
t_en: Come on... This isn't the right time to be playing games.

t_ch: 「离别和死亡，本就并蒂双生……」
t_en: "Separation and death are two sides of the same coin..."

t_ch: 「凡人怎能轻易和解呢？」
t_en: "Reconciliation doesn't come easily for a mortal."

t_ch: 这些景象，也都是岁月的涟漪吗？
t_en: Are these visions also fragments of the past?

t_ch: 唔，结果！还是没找到「翻红瑞」……
t_en: Ugh, still no luck finding any "safari"...

t_ch: 没有…应该也没关系，试着说服{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}吧。
t_en: I suppose we can do without it... Let's try to convince {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 至少它没有直接赶走*我们*。
t_en: At least they didn't toss us out straight away.

t_ch: 哇…缇宝、缇宁，快看，好厉害！
t_en: Wow! Tribbie! Trinnon! Look at this! So cool!

t_ch: *我们*…变成好多好多个了！
t_en: There are... so many of us now!
